We Just Launched Ask Ellie on Product Hunt  🎉
Ask Ellie brings all your engineering context into chat and Slack. Ask real questions about code, PRs, tickets, bugs, security, or performance and get answers from GitHub, Jira, Linear, Sentry, PostHog,  and meetings without opening another dashboard.
If this feels like how engineering should work, check us out and comment to help Ask Ellie reach more teams like yours.
Use code ASKELLIE  and get 1 month free!

Unsubscribe https://substack..dK66DETZ8g9EHdbdgNqK8JlXcmMacc52ClkpUetbwVo?
